name: GET /api/leads/sources - Catalog of accepted lead sources + per-source counts
description: Public source catalog — returns every value the LeadSource enum accepts plus the count of leads currently on file per source. Powers the admin lead-filter UI in Task 7 and confirms a submitted lead from POST /api/leads contributes to its source bucket.
skipReason: lead-service runs on its own port (4011 per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP) but the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: List sources after at least one /api/leads POST has landed
